query:
INSERT INTO puzzles (id, fen, moves, rating, themes, openingName) VALUES
('puzzle_1', 'rnbqkbnr/pp1ppppp/8/2p5/4P3/8/PPPP1PPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq c6 0 2', 'e4 c5 Nf3 d6 Be2 Nf6 O-O e6', 1200, 'tactics', 'Sicilian Defense'),
('puzzle_2', 'rnbqkbnr/pp3ppp/4p3/2ppP3/2P5/8/PP1P1PPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 4', 'e4 c5 Nf3 d6 Be2 Nf6 O-O e6 Nc3', 1400, 'middlegame', 'Sicilian Najdorf'),
